arts.ttl: Newcastle make first contact for 22-goal Fiorentina forward
arts.sum: Newcastle United have made first contact with Fiorentina in a bid to win the race to sign Moise Kean this summer. Kean has been a revelation since signing for Fiorentina from Juventus last summer. The 25-year-old has scored 22 goals ion 36 appearances across all competitions for the Italian side and is the second-highest scoring […] The post Newcastle make first contact for 22-goal Fiorentina forward first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Chelsea hit out at authorities after Newcastle United bonus despite having £190m luxury
arts.sum: Maresca made five changes to freshen up his starting line-up, as Reece James, Tosin Adarabioyo, Kiernan Dewsbury-Hall, Noni Madueke and Christopher Nkunku all came in, but Chelsea could not end their four-month wait for a Premier League win on the road. We said many times that when it's a transition game, it's physically demanding.

arts.ttl: Leicester vs Newcastle – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Leicester City host Newcastle United at the King Power Stadium in the Premier League this evening. The Foxes are resigned to relegation after a torrid return to the Premier League this season. Leicester have lost 14 of their last 15 league games and are aiming to avoid an eight consecutive home loss tonight. arts.ttl: Newcastle XI vs Leicester – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Newcastle United head to Leicester City tonight as the club’s chase for Champions League qualification continues. Eddie Howe’s side will hope to take advantage of dropped points for Chelsea and Manchester City, with victory over the struggling Foxes. A win for Newcastle will lift the Magpies into fifth, level on points with fourth-placed Chelsea. arts.ttl: Newcastle United handed huge Champions League boost in predicted final Premier League table
arts.sum: Newcastle will edge Chelsea to that precious fifth place, just one point behind Man City in fourth, meaning the Magpies would be playing Champions League football for the second time in three seasons. It's all set to go down to the final game of the season according to Opta's latest predictions, with just six points separating Forest in third with Villa in seventh in their final table.

arts.ttl: ‘First direct contact’ – Newcastle United edge ahead of Tottenham and Arsenal for signing
arts.sum: Newcastle United have been linked with Fiorentina’s Moise Kean in the past few weeks and are now reportedly looking to accelerate their move for the striker, as they edge ahead of Tottenham and Arsenal. arts.ttl: Leicester City predicted line-up v Newcastle as five youngsters included in training - Jordan Blackwell - Leicestershire Live
arts.sum: Five young Leicester City players have been training with the first team ahead of the clash with Newcastle but opportunities for game-time may remain limited. But ahead of Monday night’s clash with Newcastle, where City will look to avoid losing for a club-record eighth straight game, a quintet of youngsters have been spotted in training.

arts.ttl: Liverpool transfer news: Reds 'initiate talks' to sign 23-goal striker as Alexander Isak alternative
arts.sum: Liverpool apparently emerge as 'serious contenders' to sign a top Ligue 1 striker and have now started talks to bring him to Anfield this summer.
